text: I sense a calm anticipation. The glass walls and pristine order of the first scene inspire a feeling of clarity, yet also separation from what lies beyond. Entering the R+D space, I am invigorated; bright colors and bold text invite curiosity and reflection about the interplay between humans and technology. This place feels like a threshold to new ideas, urging me to contemplate how innovation shapes our reality and interactions. I am eager, contemplative, and open to discovery.
